name: Ham and Egg Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the hard-boiled eggs in half and remove the yolks.
2. Mash the yolks with the celery, mayonnaise, and mustard.
3. Fill the egg whites back up with the mashed mixture.
4. Place the halves back together, creating two complete eggs.
5. Wrap each egg around a slice of ham.
6. Arrange the ham rolls in a baking dish with their open sides facing down.
7. In a separate bowl, combine the soup and milk.
8. Pour the soup mixture evenly over the ham rolls.
9. Sprinkle the grated Cheddar cheese and crushed potato chips over the top.
10. Place sliced stuffed olives on top, if desired.
11. Bake at 350°F until hot and the cheese has melted.
